name: machine-surface-footer
description: Three-column footer for PointSav machine surfaces (design.pointsav.com, showcase instances, etc.). Columns: brand identity (left), machine surface links (/tokens.json, /components, /research, /healthz), substrate provenance (Doctrine claims, standards floor). Small monospace section headings (11 px caps); body at 14 px; canonical-URL base bar at 12 px muted monospace.
html:
{{brandLabel}}

    {{brandLinks}}

Machine surface

  • /tokens.json
  • /components
  • /research
  • /healthz

Substrate

    {{provenanceLinks}}
{{canonicalUrl}}
aria: <footer> is a landmark role (contentinfo) implicitly. It should be the last landmark on the page. The three columns are visually labelled with headings (h2); no additional ARIA landmarks needed inside the footer.
